description: TapTeach provides a platform for delivering educational or guided content to mobile devices in classrooms, museums, and similar venues using beacon-triggered experiences. Its public site describes educator and guest engagement products plus a portal for signup and sign-in.
summary: tapteach.org exposes one confirmed public MCP server at `https://angleradventures.tapteach.org/mcpServer`; no public HTTP/REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on the domain.

surfaces.name: Angler Adventures: Lure Guide MCP Server
